DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF PEDRO GOMEZ'S MOTION TO QUASH DEFENDANT'S SUBPOENAS FOR RECORDS IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. PURSUANT TO THE PARTIES' AGREEMENT AS STATED IN THE BRIEFING ON THIS MOTION, THE TIMEFRAME FOR THE SUBPOENA IS LIMITED TO 10 YEARS PRIOR TO THE APRIL 2, 2018 ACCIDENT AT ISSUE IN THIS CASE, TO THE PRESENT. THE SUBPOENA IS ALSO LIMITED TO THE BODY PARTS AND/OR INJURIES AT ISSUE IN THIS CASE. THE COURT WILL ISSUE AN ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: MAXWELL PRITT, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2021 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-16-2021 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-09-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion; Motion To Quash Subpoenas; Declaration Of Ross Mckissick
Off Calendar Aug-27-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Ross Mckissick, Esq. (408-512-3600; Ross@harrispersonalinjury.com) of Harris Personal Injury Lawyers, Inc. for Plaintiff, Pedro Gomez.
Kelli E. George Esq. (925-225-6840; kelli.george.ygf5@statefarm.com) of Jeanette N. Little & Associates for Defendant, Peter Irish.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF PEDRO GOMEZ's Motion To Quash Defendant's Subpoenas for Records is GRANTED IN PART and DENIED IN PART. Pursuant to the parties' agreement as stated in the briefing on this motion, the timeframe for the subpoena is limited to 10 years prior to the April 2, 2018 accident at issue in this case, to the present. The subpoena is also limited to the body parts and/or injuries at issue in this case.

The court will issue an order.

Judge Pro Tem: Maxwell Pritt, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
